title: Item Rarity Fix
body:
For Forge 1.20.1+ check out [Vivid Item Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivid-item-names) which is also made by me.

Items in Minecraft have rarities, from Common to Epic. However, their colors seem to be confusing as shown below. Item Rarity Fix is the mod that fixes this problem. 
 ![Item Rarity Fix Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pswsuQUH/images/57e418c7c02ab8c0bd574c654ebbdaad5bd7baf0.png "Vanilla (left) vs Modded (right)")

-Feel free to use on any modpack. 

-Fabric port coming soon.
